107566.description_ja_long: 立山信仰の中心をなす標高3,003mの霊峰。大宝元年に佐伯有頼が開いたと伝わり、富士山・白山と並ぶ日本三霊山として登拝されてきた。頂に雄山神社峰本社が鎮座する。
107566.description_ja_short: 頂に雄山神社峰本社を戴く立山の主峰。日本三霊山の一つ。
107566.description_en_long: Oyama is a 3,003 m sacred peak at the heart of Tateyama worship. Said to have been opened by Saeki no Ariyori in 701, it has drawn pilgrim climbers as one of Japan's Three Sacred Mountains alongside Mt. Fuji and Hakusan. Oyama Shrine's Mine Honsha sits on the summit.
107566.description_en_short: The main peak of Tateyama, crowned by Oyama Shrine's Mine Honsha; one of Japan's Three Sacred Mountains.
